Meet Your Dentist

Dr. Sakshi Sanghavi

BDS, MDS — Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics

Dr. Sakshi Sanghavi completed her BDS at the Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences, New Delhi, and went on to pursue her MDS in Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics at the Government Dental College, Kolkata—both on an All India Rank in her first attempt. With over 13 years of clinical experience, she has developed expertise in advanced microscopic endodontics, utilizing a dental operating microscope to deliver highly precise, predictable, and comfortable root canal treatments. Beyond endodontics, Dr. Sanghavi has a keen interest in aesthetic and restorative dentistry. She has attended specialized training programs in smile designing and cosmetic dentistry, helping patients achieve healthy, natural, and confident smiles. Dr. Sanghavi is also well-versed in Implant Dentistry and Prosthetic Rehabilitation, providing comprehensive solutions for tooth replacement and full-mouth rehabilitation with an emphasis on function, aesthetics, and long-term success. Supported by advanced in-house CBCT (Cone Beam Computed Tomography) imaging, she is able to achieve precise diagnosis, meticulous treatment planning, and more predictable clinical outcomes across a wide range of dental procedures. Committed to patient-centered care, she combines clinical expertise, advanced technology, and evidence-based treatment to deliver personalized care and predictable results.

  • BDS — Maulana Azad Institute of Dental Sciences, New Delhi
  • MDS — Conservative Dentistry & Endodontics, Govt. Dental College, Kolkata
  • Specialist in Microscopic Root Canal Treatment
  • Trained in Smile Designing & Aesthetic Dentistry

What We Do

Treatments We Offer

From precise microscopic root canals to complete smile makeovers, every treatment is delivered with gentle care and modern technology.

Microscopic Root Canal

Pain-free, precise endodontic treatment performed under a dental operating microscope for the highest accuracy and long-term success.

Cosmetic Dentistry & Smile Design

Complete smile transformations — from veneers and bleaching to full aesthetic makeovers — crafted to perfectly suit your face and personality.

3D CBCT Imaging

Advanced Cone Beam CT scanning for precise 3D diagnosis, treatment planning and predictable outcomes — all in-house for your convenience.

Crowns, Caps & Veneers

Durable ceramic and zirconia restorations that look and feel just like your natural teeth, restoring both strength and beauty.

Fillings & Restorations

Tooth-coloured composite fillings that restore strength and function without compromising on aesthetics.

Scaling & Polishing

Routine professional cleaning to keep your gums healthy, eliminate plaque and calculus, and give your smile a fresh brightness.

Implant Dentistry

Permanent tooth replacement using titanium implants that fuse with your jawbone — the closest thing to a natural tooth in both look and function.
